cards.example: You need a prescription to get this medication.
Submit your insurance claim within thirty days.
Your policy provides full dental coverage.
The deductible is two hundred euros per year.
The company offers a wellness programme.
The doctor gave a diagnosis after the tests.
You need a referral to see a specialist.
Annual health screenings are provided free of charge.
She is on sick leave for two weeks.
The monthly premium increased this year.
The conference venue holds five hundred people.
Catering is provided at all company events.
The keynote will be delivered by the CEO.
A banquet is planned for the final evening.
The company will exhibit at the trade fair.
The hospitality desk is near gate seven.
The event itinerary was sent to all guests.
Three companies sponsored the annual gala.
Online registration closes on the fifteenth.
Live entertainment will follow the dinner.
